children.text: any decision, certificate, permit, right-of-way, lease, or other authorization issued under section 9 of the Alaska Natural Gas Transportation Act of 1976 (); or15 U.S.C. 719g
any Presidential finding or waiver issued in accordance with that Act [ et seq.].15 U.S.C. 719

children.heading: Clarification of authority to amend terms and conditions to meet current project requirements
children.label: b Clarification of authority to amend terms and conditions to meet current project requirements

children.text: would not compel any change in the basic nature and general route of the Alaska natural gas transportation system as designated and described in section 2 of the President’s decision; or
would not otherwise prevent or impair in any significant respect the expeditious construction and initial operation of the Alaska natural gas transportation system.

children.heading: Updated environmental reviews
children.label: c Updated environmental reviews
children.text: The Secretary shall require the sponsor of the Alaska natural gas transportation system to submit such updated environmental data, reports, permits, and impact analyses as the Secretary determines are necessary to develop detailed terms, conditions, and compliance plans required by section 5 of the President’s decision.
